name: QA 1173
description:
PCP QA Test No. 1173

Exercise the BCC PMDA ucalls module - install, remove and values.



Copyright (c) 2018 Red Hat.



**To reproduce this test in a container, please run:**

    ./build/ci/run.py --runner container --platform fedora31 reproduce
